articles.title: Lewis Hamilton reportedly facing unexpected pressure over his looks after Kim Kardashian romance goes public
articles.description: Lewis Hamilton is reportedly facing greater pressure over his appearance since going public with Kim Kardashian. Insiders claim the Formula 1 star has explored wellness and cosmetic treatments, including hair restoration options, though no major procedures are planned during the racing season. Friends say the couple shares similar ambitions and has a natural connection, while Hamilton has publicly praised Kardashian's unwavering support as their relationship continues to attract widespread attention.

articles.title: "I’m working hard": Brittany Mahomes says watching Patrick Mahomes inspired one emotional promise she made to their kids

She hopes her children, Sterling, Bronze, and Golden, see both her and Patrick Mahomes working hard and following their dreams. Brittany believes leading by example will teach them that success comes through determination and perseverance. She also shared that her daughter Sterling has shown growing interest in her work, making those moments even more meaningful.

articles.title: 8 Indian Actresses Including Madhuri Dixit, Jacqueline Fernandez, Shraddha Kapoor & Sheena Chohan Who Embrace Contemporary and Classical Dance for Fitness
articles.description: From Bollywood Icons to New-Age Stars: 8 Actresses Including Madhuri Dixit, Tamannaah Bhatia, Sheena Chohan Champion Dance as the Ultimate Fitness Routine Fitness today is about much more than just gym workouts. Many Bollywood actresses are turning to dance as their go-to fitness routine because it keeps them strong, flexible, energetic, and mentally refreshed—all while letting them express themselves creatively. For actors, dance isn't just for film songs. It helps improve stamina, body language, confidence, posture, and screen presence, making it an important part of their overall fitness and performance. Here are seven actresses who make dance an essential part of both their wellness routine and their craft. MADHURI DIXIT A lifelong Kathak practitioner, Madhuri Dixit is one of the finest examples of how classical dance can become a sustainable fitness routine. Decades of rigorous training have helped her maintain remarkable stamina, flexibility, balance, and grace, proving that dance can be a lifelong path to wellness. https://www.instagram.com/p/DaDG5V6sgT_/ NORA FATEHI Known for her high-energy dance performances, Nora Fatehi treats dance as one of the most effective forms of full-body fitness. Her intense rehearsals build endurance, agility, strength, and coordination, making every performance a powerful cardio workout. https://www.instagram.com/p/DZf5SqYCcL6/ SHEENA CHOHAN Award-winning actress Sheena Chohan has trained in contemporary dance for over seven years and continues to make it an integral part of her fitness and creative routine. Rather than viewing dance as just exercise, she uses it to stay physically expressive, emotionally connected, and actor-ready . _"For me, contemporary dance isn't just exercise—it's how I reconnect with my body, imagination, and emotional truth as an actor. Every movement builds strength while keeping me creatively alive." https://www.instagram.com/reels/DaKN5PNq4bV/ SHRADDHA KAPOOR Shraddha Kapoor has often embraced dance as a fun and engaging way to stay active. Regular rehearsals and dance-based training help her improve coordination, stamina, and body control while adding an element of creativity to her fitness journey. https://www.instagram.com/reels/DY2e3sEIqce/ JACQUELINE FERNANDEZ Jacqueline Fernandez blends dance with strength training and Pilates to create a balanced fitness lifestyle. Her choreography sessions help improve endurance, mobility, and flexibility while keeping workouts enjoyable and performance-oriented. https://www.instagram.com/reel/DLndzXhts4b/ SANYA MALHOTRA Sanya Malhotra has often spoken about her love for dance and frequently shares snippets of her rehearsals and freestyle sessions. For her, dance is both an enjoyable fitness routine and a creative outlet that helps maintain agility, confidence, and mental well-being. https://www.instagram.com/p/DUXyx3zkY24/ TAMANNAAH BHATIA Whether performing in Bollywood or South Indian cinema, Tamannaah Bhatia incorporates dance into her fitness regimen to maintain flexibility, stamina, and agility. Regular rehearsals contribute significantly to the effortless energy she brings to the screen. https://www.instagram.com/p/DIS4_oaME3-/ ADITI RAO HYDARI A trained Bharatanatyam dancer, Aditi Rao Hydari credits classical dance for shaping her posture, discipline, and graceful movement. Her years of training continue to influence both her fitness routine and her elegant screen presence. https://www.instagram.com/p/DJB4kAiy1iR/ As the conversation around wellness evolves, more actresses are choosing movements that nurture both body and mind. Dance offers far more than physical transformation—it builds confidence, discipline, endurance, emotional expression, and artistic freedom. For today's performers, fitness isn't only about achieving a certain physique. It's about staying strong, expressive, and prepared for every role. And in that journey, dance continues to prove that it is not just an art form—but one of the most complete and rewarding ways to stay healthy.

articles.title: Ajay Devgn’s ‘Chauhaan’ Under Fire; Kshatriya Parishad Calls It An Attempt To Politicise Rajput Identity
articles.description:
Ajay Devgn’s upcoming film Chauhaan, directed by Neeraj Yadav, has come under scrutiny after the Kshatriya Parishad raised strong objections over its title and alleged reference to the Rajput Chauhan clan. In a statement, the organisation accused the makers of attempting to politicise Rajput identity and “appropriate” the clan name for contemporary narratives. It further stated that Rajput history should not be treated as a “political prop” and called for greater responsibility in portraying historical and community identities in cinema.

The controversy comes days after the film’s title was announced. The announcement video, set against the unrest in Kashmir, also featured Amitabh Bachchan’s iconic song Jumma Chumma. Bachchan later appreciated the title video, writing on X (formerly Twitter), “Ajay in appreciation.”

Kshatriya Parishad’s Statement On Ajay Devgn’s ‘Chauhaan’

Sharing its statement on X, the Kshatriya Parishad wrote, “We strongly condemn the attempt by Neeraj Yadav and Ajay Devgn’s upcoming film Chauhaan to appropriate the Chauhan clan name for contemporary communal politics. Rajput history is not a political prop. The legacy of the Chauhans belongs to Rajput history, not to electoral narratives or manufactured controversies of external agents. We reject every attempt to weaponise Rajput identity for ideological ends.”

ALSO READ| Amitabh Bachchan Praises Ajay Devgn’s Chauhaan, But Internet Calls It ‘Pathetic’

The organisation further stated that India’s history cannot be reduced to “simplistic communal binaries”, and reiterated its opposition to the alleged appropriation of Rajput identities for “electoral or ideological purposes”.

We strongly condemn the attempt by Neeraj Yadav and Ajay Devgn's upcoming film Chauhaan to appropriate the Chauhan clan name for contemporary communal politics.

Rajput history is not a political prop. The legacy of the Chauhans belongs to Rajput history , not to electoral... pic.twitter.com/nDRRKoikv4

— Kshatriya Parishad (@kshatriya_org) June 29, 2026

Full Statement By Kshatriya Parishad

“Kshatriya Parishad strongly condemns the recent attempt by Neeraj Yadav and actor Ajay Devgn to appropriate the Chauhan clan name for contemporary communal politics. The Chauhans are a historic Rajput (Kshatriya) lineage whose legacy belongs to history, not to partisan campaigns or manufactured media controversies.

It is deeply unfortunate that Rajput identity is once again being dragged into a political narrative that Rajputs neither initiated nor sought. At a time when Rajput voices remain underrepresented in mainstream media and public discourse, invoking a Rajput clan name merely to provoke outrage, inflame caste and communal sentiments, or generate political spectacle is both irresponsible and disrespectful.

Such attempts also betray a profound ignorance of Indian history. The subcontinent’s past cannot be reduced to simplistic communal binaries.

There are numerous examples of Afghans and Rajputs fighting alongside one another: Mahmud Lodi fought under Maharana Sanga at the Battle of Khanwa; Hakim Khan Sur commanded a contingent in Maharana Pratap’s army at Haldighati; Farid Khan, later known as Sher Shah Suri, is traditionally associated with early military service under Raja Raisal Shekhawat; and Maharaja Vikramaditya Tomar reportedly fought alongside Lodi forces in the First Battle of Panipat. These episodes reflect how medieval alliances were shaped by statecraft, loyalty, and military strategy, not by modern communal narratives.

Kshatriya Parishad rejects every attempt to weaponise Rajput history or appropriate Rajput identity for electoral or ideological purposes. Historical memory must not become a tool for communal mobilisation. We call upon political actors, filmmakers, and media organisations to engage with India’s past responsibly and to respect its historical complexity rather than exploiting Rajput heritage for divisive political narratives.”

ALSO READ| Amaal Mallik Reacts To Ketan Agarwal Murder Case, Calls Accused Siya Goyal And Chetan Chaudhury ‘Monsters’

About ‘Chauhaan’

Headlined by Ajay Devgn, Chauhaan is directed by Neeraj Yadav and produced by Jio Studios in association with Anand L Rai’s Colour Yellow Productions. The film is scheduled to release on October 1 next year.

The title was announced on the 92nd birth anniversary of Ajay Devgn’s father, veteran filmmaker Veeru Devgan.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Franz Kafka: 'Everything that you love, you will eventually lose, but in the end, love will return in a different form' - A timeless reminder that love never truly disappears by Jewish novelist
articles.description: Life changes, people leave, and relationships end, but love doesn't disappear forever. A quote widely attributed to Franz Kafka reminds us that although loss is a part of life, love finds its way back in unexpected forms, through new people, cherished memories, self-love or fresh purpose, offering hope and healing after heartbreak. Read on to know why it feels relatable even after so many decades.

articles.title: Can a snake bite through jeans or boots? Here’s what experts say and tips to stay safe outdoors
articles.description: As the monsoons set in, news of snakes making their way into houses, gardens, fields, and even trekking routes becomes frequent. Since more people tend to venture outdoors for hiking, farming, gardening, or just walking in parks, one of the questions that often arises is whether a snake can bite through jeans and shoes or not.Yes, it can, though that depends on many factors. Though wearing heavy clothing and strong shoes makes it less likely that you will be bitten by a snake, it does not necessarily mean that the snake cannot bite through it.

articles.title: Strawberry Moon 2026: Year's Most Beautiful Full Moon Visible Across India This Evening - Here's How To Watch
articles.description:
If you're looking for something truly special to witness this evening, don't forget to look up at the sky. On June 29, 2026, the much-awaited Strawberry Moon will grace the night sky, making it one of the most spectacular celestial events of the year.

This year's full moon is expected to appear unusually large, bright, and glowing with a golden-copper hue, creating a breathtaking sight across many parts of India the skies remain clear. Beyond its beauty, the event also carries scientific, cultural, and religious significance.

What Is The Strawberry Moon?

Despite its name, the Strawberry Moon is not pink or red. The name has nothing to do with the Moon's colour.

According to NASA, the term originated from Native American tribes, who used the June full moon to mark the strawberry harvesting season. Over time, the name gained popularity around the world.

In several European countries, the same full moon is also known as the Rose Moon or Honey Moon, as June is associated with blooming roses and honey harvesting.

ALSO READ | Nirjala Ekadashi 2026: A Rare Coincidence After 300 Years, Avoid These 5 Mistakes Today

Why Will The Moon Look Bigger And Golden?

This year's Strawberry Moon is expected to look especially stunning due to a natural astronomical effect.

After the summer solstice (June 21), the June full moon rises lower in the sky. When it is close to the horizon, its light passes through a thicker layer of Earth's atmosphere. During this process, shorter blue wavelengths are scattered, allowing more red and yellow light to reach our eyes. As a result, the Moon appears golden, amber, or copper-coloured.

Another fascinating effect, known as the Moon Illusion, makes the Moon appear much larger when it is near the horizon alongside familiar objects such as trees, buildings, or hills.

Strawberry Moon 2026: When To Watch In India

To enjoy the best view, step outside shortly after moonrise.

  • Date: Monday, June 29, 2026
  • Moonrise: Around 7:00 PM to 7:30 PM (depending on your location)
  • Direction: South-East
  • Best Viewing Time: Within the first one to two hours after moonrise

Although the full moon reaches its astronomical peak on the morning of June 30, it will not offer the same dramatic visual experience in India due to daylight. That's why this evening provides the best opportunity to enjoy the spectacle.

Religious Significance: Vat Purnima

This full moon also coincides with Vat Purnima, an important festival observed in several parts of Maharashtra, Gujarat, and South India.

On this day, married women observe a fast and worship the banyan tree, praying for the long life, happiness, and prosperity of their husbands. In Hindu tradition, the full moon symbolizes peace, positivity, and prosperity, making this year's Strawberry Moon even more significant.

Do You Need A Telescope?

Not at all. The Strawberry Moon can be enjoyed with the naked eye, and no special equipment is required.

For the best experience, choose an open area with minimal artificial lighting and an unobstructed view of the eastern sky. If you enjoy mobile photography, include elements such as trees, temples, buildings, or hills in your frame as the Moon rises to capture stunning, cinematic images.

ALSO READ | July Vrat Tyohar List 2026: Know The Dates Of Jagannath Rath Yatra, Gupt Navratri And Devshayani Ekadashi

Why You Shouldn't Miss It

The Strawberry Moon 2026 is much more than an ordinary full moon. It is a rare blend of astronomy, culture, and tradition that appears only once a year.

If weather conditions are favourable, take a few moments this evening to step outside and look up. You might just witness the most beautiful and memorable moonrise of 2026.

It is strongly recommended to consult a qualified expert before considering or implementing any information or belief discussed herein]
